testSteps.description: Given I have test aggregate properties with id "test-aggregate-id", name "Test Aggregate", and version 1
And I have test passport with userId "test-user-id" and permissions ["read", "write"]
Given I have created a test aggregate
When I add an integration event with message "first integration"
And I add an integration event with message "second integration"
Then the aggregate should have 2 integration events

children.description: Test Actor ensures that 2 does equal 2

testSteps.description: And the first integration event should have message "first integration"

children.description: Test Actor ensures that "first integration" does equal "first integration"

testSteps.description: And the second integration event should have message "second integration"

children.description: Test Actor ensures that "second integration" does equal "second integration"

userStory.narrative:
As a domain developer
I want to use aggregate roots to manage domain and integration events
So that I can build robust domain models with event sourcing capabilities
